Uses of Class
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.AlternateCalendar

Packages that use AlternateCalendar
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.history.calendars
Historical and alternate calendar systems for chronological calculations.

  • Uses of AlternateCalendar in org.jscience.social.history.calendars

    Subclasses of AlternateCalendar in org.jscience.social.history.calendars

    Class
    Description
    class 
    BahaiCalendar
    Implementation of the BahÃ¡'Ã­ (BadÃ­') calendar.
    class 
    ChineseCalendar
    Implementation of the traditional Chinese lunisolar calendar.
    class 
    CopticCalendar
    Implementation of the Coptic calendar.
    class 
    EthiopicCalendar
    Implementation of the Ethiopian calendar.
    class 
    FrenchCalendar
    Implementation of the French Republican Calendar (astronomical version).
    class 
    GregorianCalendar
    Implementation of the proleptic Gregorian calendar.
    class 
    HebrewCalendar
    Implementation of the Hebrew (Jewish) calendar.
    class 
    IslamicCalendar
    Implementation of the Islamic (Hijri) calendar using the tabular arithmetic method.
    class 
    ISOCalendar
    Implementation of the ISO 8601 week-date calendar.
    class 
    JulianCalendar
    Implementation of the proleptic Julian calendar.
    class 
    MayanCalendar
    Implementation of the Mayan calendar system.
    class 
    ModifiedFrenchCalendar
    Implementation of the French Republican Calendar (modified version).
    class 
    ModifiedHinduLunarBRCalendar
    Modified Hindu Lunar calendar using arbitrary-precision arithmetic.
    class 
    ModifiedHinduLunarCalendar
    Modified Hindu Lunar calendar using floating-point arithmetic.
    class 
    ModifiedHinduSolarBRCalendar
    Modified Hindu Solar calendar using arbitrary-precision arithmetic.
    class 
    ModifiedHinduSolarCalendar
    Modified Hindu Solar calendar using floating-point arithmetic.
    class 
    MonthDayYear
    Abstract base class for calendar systems that use a month-day-year date representation.
    class 
    OldHinduLunarCalendar
    Implementation of the Old Hindu Lunar calendar (Surya Siddhanta). * @version 2.1
    class 
    OldHinduSolarCalendar
    Implementation of the Old Hindu Solar calendar (Surya Siddhanta). * @version 2.1
    class 
    PersianCalendar
    Implementation of the Persian (Solar Hijri) calendar.
    class 
    SevenDaysWeek
    Abstract base class for calendar systems that use a seven-day week.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    AlternateCalendar.after(AlternateCalendar other)
    Deprecated.
    Use AlternateCalendar.isAfter(AlternateCalendar) instead.
    boolean
    AlternateCalendar.before(AlternateCalendar other)
    Deprecated.
    Use AlternateCalendar.isBefore(AlternateCalendar) instead.
    long
    AlternateCalendar.difference(AlternateCalendar other)
    Calculates the difference in days between this calendar and another.
    static long
    AlternateCalendar.difference(AlternateCalendar cal1, AlternateCalendar cal2)
    Calculates the difference in days between two calendar dates.
    boolean
    AlternateCalendar.isAfter(AlternateCalendar other)
    Checks if this calendar date is after another calendar date.
    boolean
    AlternateCalendar.isBefore(AlternateCalendar other)
    Checks if this calendar date is before another calendar date.
